description: Composition Pink sleeveless kurta with chikan work, made of a blended fabric, has a round neck with a partial portrait collar, pin tucks on the collar and below the mid neck, silver piping along the armholes and neck, white piping along the collar and below the silver piping of the neckline, and has a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Wear art wherever you go! The chikan work on this soft pink kurta from aneri is well complemented by the blingy silver piping and toned down by the contrasting white. The partial portrait collar alongside the round neck enhance its fashion appeal. Pair it with loose pyjamas and chunky earrings. Model statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 5'7" and chest 32"
